title: South Waziristan's Maulvi Nazir: The New Face of the Taliban
summary: "Pakistan is experimenting with the Taliban yet again. The primary focus of the effort is to de-link the Taliban from al-Qaeda and bring them back into the Pakistani sphere of influence."
body: Note This article was reprinted as " A New Face for the Taliban " in the Asia Times on May 24, 2007.
